description_long: This is a full-size, slim-profile keyboard with a standard key layout, including a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The keys are low-profile and rectangular, with white printed legends that contrast against the dark, matte plastic chassis. The keyboard features a gentle curve along the top edge, likely for ergonomic comfort, and the surface appears smooth with a slight sheen. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting a wireless design. The overall build is lightweight, with a thin body and minimal bezel around the keys. No brand logo is visible on the surface.
description: A slim, full-size keyboard with a numeric keypad, dark matte finish, and white key legends. The design is sleek and modern, with low-profile keys and no visible cables.
description_view_0: Side view showing the keyboard's slim profile and low height, with the keys slightly raised above the chassis.
description_view_1: Angled view from the left, highlighting the full key layout and the gentle curve along the top edge.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the complete key arrangement, including the numeric keypad and standard key spacing.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, emphasizing the numeric keypad and the overall thinness of the keyboard.
